text: <par>The Khaling form <latinform>ghwaan-dü-rü</latinform> (144124,49522), and the Thulung form <latinform>gun-diu-riu</latinform> (49552,144123) may be loans; the three syllables are slightly suspicious.</par>
<par>1st syll. was tagged with now-defunct #1764 <latinform>kwəy </latinform> DOG.</par>
<par>siu is a suffix used in animal names.</par>
